title: mentha × amaurophylla var. rugosa
intro: Mentha × amaurophylla var. rugosa, also known as rugosa mint, is a hybrid plant derived from the combination of Mentha aquatica and Mentha × gracilis. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Mentha × amaurophylla var. rugosa include its potential to soothe headaches, improve respiratory function, and lower blood pressure. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
